actionConfiguration.body:
SELECT
    u.id AS userId,
    u.username AS username
FROM pos_user_access_codes pac
JOIN users u ON u.id = pac.user_id
WHERE pac.company_id = {{appsmith.store.companyId}}
  AND pac.user_id = {{appsmith.store.userId}}
  AND pac.is_active = 1
  AND u.is_active = 1
  AND pac.access_code_hash = SHA2({{SalesPOSCodeInput.text}}, 256)
LIMIT 1;
